stories.title: **Headline:** SEC Tournament Day 2 — Second Round Clears the Path to Top Seeds

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Four games. One bracket. Today at the SEC Tournament in Lexington: Texas A&M vs Auburn (10 AM), Arkansas vs MSU (1 PM), Tennessee vs Ole Miss (4 PM), LSU vs Georgia (7 PM). All on SEC Network. The survivors meet Oklahoma, Alabama, Florida, and Tennessee Thursday. #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: The SEC Tournament bracket is being sorted in Lexington right now. By tonight we'll know who faces No. 1 Oklahoma on Thursday — and who gets to pitch to Kendall Wells. #SECSoftball #NCAASoftball

article.headline: SEC Tournament Day 2: Four Second-Round Games Clear the Path to Top Seeds in Lexington

stories.title: **Headline:** Wells at 36 — Oklahoma Rests and Waits as NCAA Record Hangs in the Air

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Kendall Wells: 36 HRs. The NCAA all-time record: 37 (Lauren Espinoza, Arizona, 1995). Oklahoma doesn't play until Thursday. The record is just… sitting there. #Sooners #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: No. 1 Oklahoma earned the double bye. No games until Thursday. Kendall Wells is one home run from tying the greatest individual record in college softball history. 31 years. One swing. #Sooners #SECSoftball

article.headline: Kendall Wells at 36 HRs: Oklahoma's Double Bye Turns the Record Watch Into a National Vigil

stories.title: **Headline:** Big Ten Tournament Opens Today — Nebraska Watches as the Bracket Sets

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: The Big Ten Softball Tournament is LIVE in College Park. Four first-round games today on BTN. Nebraska (43-6, 23-1) waits as the No. 1 seed — they earned a bye into Thursday's quarterfinals with the program's first-ever Big Ten regular season title. #Huskers #BigTen

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text: Nebraska watches. Washington, Ohio State, Wisconsin, Northwestern all have to earn their Thursday shot at the No. 1 Huskers. Big Ten Tournament. College Park. All day on BTN. #Huskers #BigTenSoftball

article.headline: Big Ten Tournament Opens in College Park — Nebraska Waits as the No. 1 Seed

stories.title: **Headline:** ACC Championship First Round Today — FSU Rests as Challengers Battle in Charlottesville

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: The ACC Softball Championship is underway in Charlottesville. No. 1 seed FSU rests and watches today — the Seminoles don't play until Thursday. A title run strengthens their national seed case. #Noles #ACCSoftball

article.headline: ACC Tournament Opens in Charlottesville — FSU's National Seed Bid Runs Through This Week

stories.title: **Headline:** Big 12 Tournament Starts Tomorrow — Texas Tech and Canady Return to Devon Park

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Big 12 Tournament at Devon Park opens TOMORROW. No. 1 Texas Tech (50-5) faces Baylor at 1:30 PM CT — the fourth time in seven days. NiJaree Canady just threw a perfect game. She's ready. #WreckEm #Big12Softball

article.headline: Big 12 Tournament Preview: Texas Tech and a Post-Perfect-Game Canady Open at Devon Park Thursday

stories.title: **Headline:** Final NFCA Poll — Oklahoma No. 1, Nebraska Rises to No. 2

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text: Final NFCA poll before Selection Sunday: No. 1 Oklahoma. No. 2 Nebraska. No. 3 Texas Tech. No. 4 Alabama. Conference tournament week starts NOW — by Sunday, the bracket picture will look very different. #NCAASoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** WCWS in 22 Days — Four More Sleeps to Selection Show

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text: 22 days to the WCWS. Selection Show is THIS SUNDAY — May 10, 7 PM ET on ESPN2. 32 teams. 16 national seeds. The bracket that determines it all drops in four days. Who's your No. 1 overall seed? #WCWS #NCAASoftball
